Definition: Logical Model for representing a complete Digital Adaptation Kit (DAK) with metadata and all 9 DAK components
Identifier for the DAK (e.g., smart.who.int.base)
Short name for the DAK (e.g., Base)
Full title of the DAK (e.g., SMART Base)
Description of the DAK - either Markdown content or a URI to a Markdown file (absolute or relative to repository root)
Version of the DAK
Publication status of the DAK
Canonical URL for the published DAK (e.g., https://smart.who.int/base for WHO repositories)
Preview URL for the current CI build (e.g., https://worldhealthorganization.github.io/smart-base)
The canonical URL to use for this DAK instance - equals publicationUrl for release branches, previewUrl for development branches
License under which the DAK is published
Year or year range for copyright
Organization responsible for publishing the DAK

Definition: Whether Crowdin integration is active
